description: Mexican criminal organization based in Jalisco, formed in 2018 as a split from the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. It operates primarily in the Guadalajara metropolitan area and disputes territory with CJNG. The group is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, robbery, murder, and arms trafficking, and has received funding from the Sinaloa Cartel. Its founding leaders were Érick Valencia Salazar, Emilio Alejandro Pulido Saldaña, and Carlos Enrique Sánchez Martínez.
